ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَنۡ أَنذِرۡ قَوۡمَكَ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يَأۡتِيَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment
ayahs.transliteration: Inna arsalna noohan ila qawmihi an anthir qawmaka min qabli an yatiyahum AAathabun aleemun

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ إِنِّي لَكُمۡ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.translation: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ya qawmi innee lakum natheerun mubeenun

ayahs.arabic: أَنِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
ayahs.translation: [Saying], 'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me
ayahs.transliteration: Ani oAAbudoo Allaha waittaqoohu waateeAAooni

ayahs.arabic: يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمۡ وَيُؤَخِّرۡكُمۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمًّىۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُۚ لَوۡ كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
ayahs.translation: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew
ayahs.transliteration: Yaghfir lakum min thunoobikum wayuakhkhirkum ila ajalin musamman inna ajala Allahi itha jaa la yuakhkharu law kuntum taAAlamoona

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُ قَوۡمِي لَيۡلٗا وَنَهَارٗا
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi innee daAAawtu qawmee laylan wanaharan

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمۡ يَزِدۡهُمۡ دُعَآءِيٓ إِلَّا فِرَارٗا
ayahs.translation: But my invitation increased them not except in flight
ayahs.transliteration: Falam yazidhum duAAaee illa firaran

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنِّي كُلَّمَا دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ لِتَغۡفِرَ لَهُمۡ جَعَلُوٓاْ أَصَٰبِعَهُمۡ فِيٓ ءَاذَانِهِمۡ وَٱسۡتَغۡشَوۡاْ ثِيَابَهُمۡ وَأَصَرُّواْ وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ ٱسۡتِكۡبَارٗا
ayahs.translation: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance
ayahs.transliteration: Wainnee kullama daAAawtuhum litaghfira lahum jaAAaloo asabiAAahum fee athanihim waistaghshaw thiyabahum waasarroo waistakbaroo istikbaran

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ جِهَارٗا
ayahs.translation: Then I invited them publicly
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma innee daAAawtuhum jiharan

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّيٓ أَعۡلَنتُ لَهُمۡ وَأَسۡرَرۡتُ لَهُمۡ إِسۡرَارٗا
ayahs.translation: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma innee aAAlantu lahum waasrartu lahum israran

ayahs.arabic: فَقُلۡتُ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمۡ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارٗا
ayahs.translation: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver
ayahs.transliteration: Faqultu istaghfiroo rabbakum innahu kana ghaffaran

ayahs.arabic: يُرۡسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّدۡرَارٗا
ayahs.translation: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
ayahs.transliteration: Yursili alssamaa AAalaykum midraran

ayahs.arabic: وَيُمۡدِدۡكُم بِأَمۡوَٰلٖ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ جَنَّـٰتٖ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ أَنۡهَٰرٗا
ayahs.translation: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers
ayahs.transliteration: Wayumdidkum biamwalin wabaneena wayajAAal lakum jannatin wayajAAal lakum anharan

ayahs.arabic: مَّا لَكُمۡ لَا تَرۡجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارٗا
ayahs.translation: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur
ayahs.transliteration: Ma lakum la tarjoona lillahi waqaran

ayahs.arabic: وَقَدۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ أَطۡوَارًا
ayahs.translation: While He has created you in stages
ayahs.transliteration: Waqad khalaqakum atwaran

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَوۡاْ كَيۡفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبۡعَ سَمَٰوَٰتٖ طِبَاقٗا
ayahs.translation: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers
ayahs.transliteration: Alam taraw kayfa khalaqa Allahu sabAAa samawatin tibaqan

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلَ ٱلۡقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورٗا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ سِرَاجٗا
ayahs.translation: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAala alqamara feehinna nooran wajaAAala alshshamsa sirajan

ayahs.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ نَبَاتٗا
ayahs.translation: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth
ayahs.transliteration: WaAllahu anbatakum mina alardi nabatan

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمۡ فِيهَا وَيُخۡرِجُكُمۡ إِخۡرَاجٗا
ayahs.translation: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma yuAAeedukum feeha wayukhrijukum ikhrajan

ayahs.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِسَاطٗا
ayahs.translation: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse
ayahs.transliteration: WaAllahu jaAAala lakumu alarda bisatan

ayahs.arabic: لِّتَسۡلُكُواْ مِنۡهَا سُبُلٗا فِجَاجٗا
ayahs.translation: That you may follow therein roads of passage
ayahs.transliteration: Litaslukoo minha subulan fijajan

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ نُوحٞ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمۡ عَصَوۡنِي وَٱتَّبَعُواْ مَن لَّمۡ يَزِدۡهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارٗا
ayahs.translation: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss
ayahs.transliteration: Qala noohun rabbi innahum AAasawnee waittabaAAoo man lam yazidhu maluhu wawaladuhu illa khasaran

ayahs.arabic: وَمَكَرُواْ مَكۡرٗا كُبَّارٗا
ayahs.translation: And they conspired an immense conspiracy
ayahs.transliteration: Wamakaroo makran kubbaran

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُواْ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدّٗا وَلَا سُوَاعٗا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسۡرٗا
ayahs.translation: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo la tatharunna alihatakum wala tatharunna waddan wala suwaAAan wala yaghootha wayaAAooqa wanasran

ayahs.arabic: وَقَدۡ أَضَلُّواْ كَثِيرٗاۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَٰلٗا
ayahs.translation: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error
ayahs.transliteration: Waqad adalloo katheeran wala tazidi alththalimeena illa dalalan

ayahs.arabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٰٔتِهِمۡ أُغۡرِقُواْ فَأُدۡخِلُواْ نَارٗا فَلَمۡ يَجِدُواْ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارٗا
ayahs.translation: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers
ayahs.transliteration: Mimma khateeatihim oghriqoo faodkhiloo naran falam yajidoo lahum min dooni Allahi ansaran

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٞ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرۡ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
ayahs.translation: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant
ayahs.transliteration: Waqala noohun rabbi la tathar AAala alardi mina alkafireena dayyaran

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرۡهُمۡ يُضِلُّواْ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓاْ إِلَّا فَاجِرٗا كَفَّارٗا
ayahs.translation: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever
ayahs.transliteration: Innaka in tatharhum yudilloo AAibadaka wala yalidoo illa fajiran kaffaran

ayahs.arabic: رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَلِوَٰلِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيۡتِيَ مُؤۡمِنٗا وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارَۢا
ayahs.translation: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi ighfir lee waliwalidayya waliman dakhala baytiya muminan walilmumineena waalmuminati wala tazidi alththalimeena illa tabaran
